title: AEP Grant Awarded!
body:
Big news — Stone Bicycle Coalition has been awarded a **$1,000 grant** from the American Empathy Project!

This funding supports our Pedal for Empathy community ride on May 2nd. We'll be riding together, cleaning up trails, and sharing a meal.

No fancy bike needed. Just show up.

title: Pedal for Empathy — May 2nd
body:
Mark your calendars! Our biggest community ride of the year is coming up.

**When:** May 2, 2026 at 10am
**Where:** Minneluzahan Senior Center, 315 N 4th St
**What:** Group ride + trail cleanup + community meal

All ages, all skills, all bikes welcome. Free to attend.

Partner: Acme Bikes

title: Free Bikes Seeking Riders
body:
We have bikes available for anyone who needs reliable transportation. Refurbished with care, tuned up, and ready to ride.

Every donated bike means new opportunities, fresh air, and a few more smiles out on the road.

Contact us to find your match.

title: Tuesday Open Shop is Back
body:
Stop by every **Tuesday from 3:30–6pm** at the Minneluzahan Senior Center.

Bring your bike for a tune-up, learn basic repairs, or just hang out with fellow cyclists. Tools and expertise provided — all skill levels welcome.

Cycling is one of the most democratic forms of transportation. Let's keep it rolling.

title: Black Hills Works Partnership
body:
Huge thanks to our friends at Black Hills Works for hosting a fleet maintenance workshop. Together we processed 18 bikes and got 15 back on the road.

This is what community looks like — ride together, clean together, eat together.
